query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS totalLinhas,
  COUNT(DISTINCT nrOperacao) AS totalContratos,
  COALESCE(SUM(CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(15,4))), 0) AS somaTodas,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(comissao_unica), 0) FROM (
    SELECT MAX(CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(15,4))) AS comissao_unica
    FROM pro_rata WHERE codEst = '1'
    GROUP BY nrOperacao
  ) sub2) AS somaUnicaPorContrato
FROM pro_rata
WHERE codEst = '1';

  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(comissao_unica), 0) FROM (
